examples.exam_en: She travels to work by car every day.
He carefully backed the car into the garage.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 조심스럽게 차를 차고 안으로 후진시켰다.

examples.exam_en: She became a Presidential candidate last year.
He is the Democratic candidate for President.
She was diagnosed with breast cancer last month.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 지난달 유방 암 진단을 받았다.

examples.exam_en: The cancer patient received treatment at the hospital.
Thousands of people lived in a refugee camp.
examples.exam_ko: 수천 명의 사람들이 난민 수용소에서 생활했다.

examples.exam_en: They pitched camp near the river.
She bought an autofocus camera for the trip.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 여행을 위해 자동 초점 카메라를 샀다.

examples.exam_en: He loaded the camera with film before the shoot.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 촬영 전에 카메라에 필름을 넣었다.

examples.exam_en: The president formed a single-party Cabinet.
The new cabinet member was appointed yesterday.
She wore a coat with a fancy button on it.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 장식 단추가 달린 코트를 입었다.

examples.exam_en: He fastened the buttons on his jacket quickly.
She spread fresh butter on the warm bread.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 따뜻한 빵에 신선한 버터를 발랐다.

examples.exam_en: The recipe calls for artificial butter instead of real.
examples.exam_ko: 그 레시피는 진짜 대신 인조 버터를 사용한다.

examples.exam_en: He is rich, but not happy.
My mother went, but I did not.
examples.exam_ko: 어머니는 갔지만, 그러나 나는 가지 않았다.

examples.exam_en: He works in the banking business.
She runs a tailoring business downtown.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 시내에서 양복 재봉 업을 운영한다.

examples.exam_en: The bus depot is located near the city center.
examples.exam_ko: 버스 터미널은 시내 중심부 근처에 있다.

examples.exam_en: The bus fare increased this month.
The soldier had bullet wounds on his arm.
The officer loaded a live bullet into the gun.
examples.exam_ko: 그 경찰관은 총에 실제 실탄을 장전했다.

examples.exam_en: The old wooden building was torn down last year.
examples.exam_ko: 그 오래된 목조 건물은 작년에 철거되었다.

examples.exam_en: The architect designed a building for the new district.
examples.exam_ko: 건축가는 새 구역을 위한 건물을 설계했다.

examples.exam_en: His elder brother teaches at a university.
Her younger brother just started middle school.
Channel 5 will broadcast the game at 6 o'clock.
She broadcast the gossip all over the office.
They built the house out of red brick.
The critics threw bricks at the new film.
She bought a loaf of bread at the bakery.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 빵집에서 빵 한 덩어리를 샀다.

examples.exam_en: He ate a hunk of bread for breakfast.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 아침으로 빵 한 조각을 먹었다.

examples.exam_en: She polished the brass fixtures until they shone.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 놋쇠 부품들을 빛날 때까지 닦았다.

examples.exam_en: The CIA brass approved the operation.
The orchestra's brass instruments sounded magnificent.
The doctor discovered a brain tumor during the scan.
He is a man of great brains and talent.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 뛰어난 두뇌와 재능을 가진 사람이다.

examples.exam_en: The opposition party decided to boycott the election.
Workers voted to boycott the company meeting.
